---
title: "nitrix.metrics.contrastive"
generated: true
signature-hash: 817da0d568cfcb31
description: "Contrastive / self-supervised representation kernels."
listing:
  id: nitrix-metrics-contrastive-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-metrics-contrastive/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.metrics.contrastive`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Contrastive / self-supervised representation kernels.

- [`info_nce`](nitrix-metrics-contrastive/info_nce.qmd) -- the InfoNCE / NT-Xent objective between two aligned view
  batches: pull the matched pair together and push every other sample apart
  on the unit sphere.
- [`dino_cross_entropy`](nitrix-metrics-contrastive/dino_cross_entropy.qmd) -- the self-distillation cross-entropy between a
  sharpened, centred teacher distribution (stop-gradient) and a student.
- [`ibot_cross_entropy`](nitrix-metrics-contrastive/ibot_cross_entropy.qmd) -- the masked-token variant of the above,
  averaged over the masked positions of each sample.
- [`koleo`](nitrix-metrics-contrastive/koleo.qmd) -- the Kozachenko--Leonenko differential-entropy regulariser:
  spread features out by penalising small nearest-neighbour distances.

These are *score kernels*: they take the **objective structure** (the view
pairing, the masked-token selection, the teacher `center` and its EMA) as
explicit arguments rather than baking a recipe in, and they reduce through the
shared leaf reduction. The EMA / centre bookkeeping and the view-stacking
layout are recipes and stay with the caller.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `b` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `t` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-metrics-contrastive-symbols}
:::
